case_title: CENTRE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SHARPER IMAGE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PER MOVING PARTY
ARBITRATOR MARK ISAAC SCHICKMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-27-2003 THROUGH SEP-25-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-21-2003 CONTINUED TO JAN-27-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH DEC-30-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT.
